# explorer/B2: completed from packet iDo for S20-T2-A-E3
from openpyxl import Workbook
from openpyxl.styles import Font, PatternFill

def header_style(ws, cell):
    ws[cell].font = Font(bold=True)
    ws[cell].fill = PatternFill("solid", fgColor="1F4E79")
ws = Workbook().active
header_style(ws, "A1")
print(ws["A1"].font.bold)
# B2 dual-run (Explorer): re-validated vs packet S20 S20-T2-A-E3

# explorer/B2: completed from packet iDo for S20-T3-B-E3
def validate_rows(rows, allowed):
    return [r["region"] for r in rows if r["region"] not in allowed]
print(validate_rows([{"region": "Lima"}, {"region": "Piura"}], {"Lima", "Cusco"}))

exercises.code:
# explorer/B2: completed from packet iDo for S20-T4-B-E2
import hashlib

def build(rows):
    return "\n".join(["region,monto"] + [f"{r},{m}" for r, m in sorted(rows)]) + "\n"
r1 = [("Lima", 10), ("Cusco", 5)]
print(hashlib.sha1(build(r1).encode()).hexdigest() == hashlib.sha1(build(list(reversed(r1))).encode()).hexdigest())
# B2 dual-run (Explorer): re-validated vs packet S20 S20-T4-B-E2

selfcheck.chosen_text: No; suele devolver la fórmula o cache si existe
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: B2-Explorer: openpyxl sin Excel instalado no evalúa fórmulas automáticamente; suele devolver la fórmula o el valor cacheado si existe.
B2-Explorer: En celdas combinadas se escribe en la celda ancla (top-left) del merge.

selfcheck.chosen_text: Estados de batch, conciliación y backups
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: B2-Explorer: Manifest del excel factory audita estados de batch, conciliación y backups.
B2-Explorer: Idempotencia: misma entrada → mismo resultado lógico al re-ejecutar.
